arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti takes huge gamble as Real Madrid put another trophy at risk
arts.sum: On Wednesday (February 5), Madrid make the short trip to Leganés in the quarterfinals of the Spanish Cup, a game in which Ancelotti has opted to leave out a number of his major stars. Courtois has also been rested for the cup game, with a crucial LaLiga derby against Atlético Madrid coming up at the Santiago Bernabéu on Saturday (February 8).

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe injury: Progress and potential return date
arts.sum: The latest injury news and updates on Kylian Mbappe after Real Madrid's weekend defeat to Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Real Betis President Criticizes Real Madrid’s Statements on Refereeing
arts.sum: During the official presentation of new signings Antony and ‘Cucho’ Hernández, Real Betis president Ángel Haro expressed his disagreement with Real Madrid ’s recent statement regarding the state of refereeing in Spanish football. Haro criticized both Real Madrid’s approach and the response from the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF), which he believes has been too lenient.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barcelona aren’t always Spain’s two biggest clubs
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Leganés in the quarterfinals of the 2024/25 Copa del Rey on Wednesday (February 5) looking to keep their hopes of winning the competition for the 21st time alive. The surprise team that has won the Copa del Rey more than Real Madrid
